title: Tick attachments (screenshots for content review)
description:
Add support for file attachments (primarily screenshots) to ticks. Key use case: content review workflows where visual proof is required before approval.

## Overview

Users can attach images to ticks via CLI. Files are uploaded to R2 via tickboard.dev worker, stored with permanent unguessable URLs. Attachments display across all interfaces (CLI, TUI, web board).

## Design Decisions

- **Storage**: Cloudflare R2 via tickboard.dev worker proxy
- **Auth**: Existing ~/.tickboardrc token (TICKBOARD_TOKEN)
- **URL format**: `https://attachments.tickboard.dev/{random24}/{filename}`
- **Security**: Unguessable 24-char random path (no project/tick in URL)
- **Cost**: ~$0.01/month per 1000 screenshots (negligible, free tier covers 33K+)

## Data Structure

```go
type Attachment struct {
    ID          string    `json:"id"`           // 4-char internal ref (a1b2)
    Key         string    `json:"key"`          // 24-char random R2 key
    Filename    string    `json:"filename"`     // original filename
    Description string    `json:"description"`  // optional caption
    ContentType string    `json:"content_type"` // image/png, image/jpeg, etc.
    Size        int64     `json:"size"`         // bytes
    URL         string    `json:"url"`          // full permanent URL
    UploadedAt  time.Time `json:"uploaded_at"`
    UploadedBy  string    `json:"uploaded_by"`
}

type Tick struct {
    // ... existing fields
    Attachments []Attachment `json:"attachments,omitempty"`
}
```

## CLI Commands

```bash
# Attach file to tick
tk attach <tick-id> <file> [--description "caption"]

# List attachments
tk attachments <tick-id>

# Remove attachment
tk detach <tick-id> <attachment-id>

# Open attachment in browser
tk attach <tick-id> --open <attachment-id>
```

## Upload Flow

```
tk attach abc screenshot.png --description "Login page redesign"
    │
    ├─ Validate: file exists, is image, <10MB
    ├─ Read token from ~/.tickboardrc
    │
    ▼
POST https://tickboard.dev/api/attachments
  Authorization: Bearer <token>
  Content-Type: multipart/form-data
  Body: file, filename, content_type
    │
    ▼
Worker (tickboard.dev):
  • Validate token
  • Generate 24-char random key
  • Upload to R2: {key}/{filename}
  • Return: {key, url, size, content_type}
    │
    ▼
CLI:
  • Generate 4-char attachment ID
  • Update .tick/issues/abc.json with attachment
  • Output: "Attached a1b2: screenshot.png (245KB)"
```

## Display Integration

### tk show
```
╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ abc  P2  task  ◐  @alice                                    │
│                                                             │
│ Review login page redesign                                  │
│                                                             │
│ Description:                                                │
│   Please review the new login page design.                  │
│                                                             │
│ Attachments:                                                │
│   📎 a1b2  Login page redesign (login.png, 245KB)          │
│   📎 c3d4  Error state (error.png, 89KB)                   │
│                                                             │
│ Created: 2024-01-15 10:30 by alice                          │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
```

### tk view (TUI)
- Show attachments section in right pane detail view
- Keybinding to open attachment in browser (e.g., 'o' on selected attachment)

### tk board (web)
- Attachment count badge on cards: 📎 2
- Detail drawer: thumbnail grid with lightbox viewer
- Click thumbnail to open full-size in modal

### tk list
- Optional: show 📎 indicator for ticks with attachments

## Validation Rules

- Max file size: 10MB
- Allowed types: image/png, image/jpeg, image/gif, image/webp
- Max attachments per tick: 10
- Filename sanitization: alphanumeric, dash, underscore, dot only

## Error Handling

- No token configured: "Error: tickboard.dev authentication required. Run 'tk auth' or set TICKBOARD_TOKEN"
- Upload failed: Retry with backoff, clear error message
- File too large: "Error: file exceeds 10MB limit"
- Invalid type: "Error: only images allowed (png, jpg, gif, webp)"

## Future Considerations (not in scope)

- Video attachments
- Paste from clipboard
- Drag-drop in tk board
- Attachment comments/annotations
- Automatic screenshot capture
